scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/env/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/guard/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/ai/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/prompts/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/db/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/knowledge/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/rlm/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/memory/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/vision/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/tools/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit --project packages/personalize/tsconfig.json
scripts.knowledge:setup: docker compose up -d && bun run packages/knowledge/scripts/init-schema.ts
